summary: Iteration 241: Complete testing of Referral Milestone/Progress System. 10/12 backend tests passed (2 failed due to rate limiting 429, not actual failures). Frontend UI verified - CustomerDashboardV3 shows milestone progress bar with 'X referrals completed · Next: Y', ReferralsPage has 'Your Progress' section with MilestoneBar components for both Referrals and Earnings dimensions.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) triggered after multiple test logins - expected behavior but affects test suite

referral_milestone_notification_event.message_template: You've reached {milestone_value} {milestone_type}. Keep sharing to earn more.

referral_points_banner_milestone_progres.note: Component exists with milestone progress indicator when milestones data is available

critical_code_review_comments: compute_milestones() function correctly implements pure computation from referral count and earnings
check_and_send_milestone_notification() properly deduplicates notifications using user_milestones collection
MilestoneBar component in ReferralsPage.jsx correctly renders progress bars with gold color (#D4A843)
CustomerDashboardV3 referral card shows progress bar using ref.successful_referrals and ref.next_milestone
ReferralPointsBanner has data-testid='dashboard-milestone-progress' for milestone progress indicator
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 241 verified Milestone/Progress System: (1) All milestone APIs working - /overview and /me return milestones object with referrals and earnings dimensions. (2) Dashboard metrics /customer endpoint returns referral.successful_referrals and referral.next_milestone. (3) Milestone computation correct: 0 referrals → next_target=1, achieved=[], all_complete=false. (4) Frontend ReferralsPage has 'Your Progress' section with MilestoneBar components showing progress bars and next milestone indicators. (5) CustomerDashboardV3 referral card shows 'X referrals completed · Next: Y' with progress bar. (6) referral_milestone notification event registered in in_app_notification_service.py. (7) Rate limiting (429) may occur after multiple test logins - wait 60+ seconds between test runs.
